---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

Feel free to reach out — I'm always happy to chat about research, collaboration, or anything else.

**Email:** [philippe.sloksnath@uzh.ch](mailto:philippe.sloksnath@uzh.ch){target="_blank"}

**Institution:** Department of Communication and Media Research, University of Zurich

<div class="social-icons">
  <a href="mailto:philippe.sloksnath@uzh.ch"
     target="_blank"
     aria-label="Email"
     data-tooltip="philippe.sloksnath@uzh.ch">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
  </a>

  <a href="https://github.com/sloegge"
     target="_blank"
     rel="noopener noreferrer"
     aria-label="GitHub"
     data-tooltip="github.com/sloegge">
    <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
  </a>

  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/philippe-sloksnath"
     target="_blank"
     rel="noopener noreferrer"
     aria-label="LinkedIn"
     data-tooltip="linkedin.com/in/philippe-sloksnath">
    <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
  </a>

  <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/philippesloksnath.bsky.social"
     target="_blank"
     rel="noopener noreferrer"
     aria-label="Bluesky"
     data-tooltip="bsky.app/profile/philippesloksnath">
    <i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i>
  </a>

  <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=de&user=80htikoAAAAJ"
     target="_blank"
     rel="noopener noreferrer"
     aria-label="Google Scholar"
     data-tooltip="scholar.google.com">
    <i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i>
  </a>

  <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0004-5792-6768"
     target="_blank"
     rel="noopener noreferrer"
     aria-label="ORCID"
     data-tooltip="orcid.org/0009-0004-5792-6768">
    <i class="ai ai-orcid"></i>
  </a>
</div>
